stepsSummary: Log food, workouts, and body entries then inspect calorie, workout, and weight analytics views.
expectedSummary: Charts and weekly summary cards render with coherent trend context.
errorMessage:
Error: expect(locator).toContainText(expected) failed Locator: locator('#weeklySummaryCard') Expected substring: "Weekly Summary" Received string: "" Timeout: 7000ms Call log: - Expect "toContainText" with timeout 7000ms - waiting for locator('#weeklySummaryCard') 11 × locator resolved to
- unexpected value ""
summary: BUG: UAT-010 Recomposition trend visibility - Error: expect(locator).toContainText(expected) failed
reproSteps: Create representative nutrition, training, and body measurements.
Open analytics calories sub-tab and verify summary card.
Open workout sub-tab and verify stats card.
Open weight sub-tab and verify chart rendering.
expected: Charts and weekly summary cards render with coherent trend context.
recommendation: Fix the failing Analytics flow and add a regression assertion for this scenario.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario UAT-010 completes without blocking errors.
Verify: Charts render without runtime errors.
Verify: Summary cards show non-empty trend values.
